title: 宝塚記念の後に・覚悟を刻みて

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: You were incredible too, Mejiro McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! You two did great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although we lost to Mejiro Ryan, we still did
incredibly well on the grand stage of the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks for giving 110 percent out there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Did I finally earn my spot as your big sister?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have never not looked up to you as my older
sister. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I am the one who should be thanking you. If it
weren't for our rematch, I wouldn't have realized
how insufficient my resolve was.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You have my gratitude. Thank you, Ryan. Truly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(Thanks to you, I feel as though I've learned
something... The way I ought to be as a Mejiro.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, although the Takarazuka Kinen has come to
a close...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Competing with Ryan has allowed me to see my
next goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My next objective shall be the autumn Tenno
Sho, following my win in the spring—the Twin
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It is a feat yet to be achieved by anyone in the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now that Grandmother has entrusted me with the
task...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I want to show her, and everyone else in my
family, a new path forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, without fail!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fire burns in Mejiro McQueen's eyes as she sets
her sights on this new goal—successive wins in the
spring and autumn Tenno Sho.
